tasks.title: Example: Implement user authentication UI
tasks.description: Create login and signup forms with email/password authentication
acceptanceCriteria: Login form with email and password fields
Signup form with email, password, and confirm password fields
Form validation for email format and password strength
Error messages displayed for failed authentication
Responsive design on mobile and desktop

tasks.title: Example: Set up Supabase authentication
tasks.description: Configure Supabase Auth for email/password authentication
acceptanceCriteria: Supabase Auth configured for email provider
User profile table created with proper RLS policies

tasks.title: Example: Integrate frontend with backend auth
tasks.description: Connect frontend auth UI with Supabase Auth backend
acceptanceCriteria: Login form calls Supabase Auth API
Signup form creates user in Supabase
Auth state managed in Zustand store
Auth state persists across page refreshes
